steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The Dial is explored in depth while Voices remains about which relatively little is known — opposing conditions requiring a contrast transition.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
The logical relationship is contrast — the Dial is extensively studied while Voices is largely unknown. The blank needs a transition signaling that opposition.
  • Choice A — "likewise,": signals similarity, so fails — the two journals are in opposite situations, not comparable ones. ✗
  • Choice B — "moreover,": signals addition of a reinforcing point, so fails — the second clause contradicts rather than extends the first. ✗
  • Choice C — "though,": signals contrast (despite what applies to one, the opposite applies to the other), so fits. ✓
  • Choice D — "for instance,": signals a specific example of a general claim, so fails — no general claim is being illustrated. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
